name: Accenture plc
summary: Accenture plc is a global professional services company providing strategy, consulting, technology, operations, Song, and Industry X services to help enterprises reinvent through AI and digital transformation. It serves more than 9,000 clients including three-quarters of the Fortune Global 100 and 500, generating $69.7 billion in fiscal 2025 revenues. It employs approximately 779,000 people and operates across three geographic markets: Americas, EMEA, and Asia Pacific.

products.name: SynOps
products.description: AI-powered, cloud-enabled platform that transforms enterprise operations through data, processes, automation and ecosystem technology partners.

products.name: Reinvention Services
products.description: Integrated business unit combining strategy, consulting, technology, operations, Song, and Industry X capabilities with AI and deep industry expertise.

products.name: Strategy and Consulting
products.description: Advisory services helping C-suite executives set strategic priorities, build digital cores, and drive enterprise reinvention.

products.name: Technology Services
products.description: Services covering AI, data, cloud, systems integration, application management, security, software engineering, and infrastructure.

products.name: Operations
products.description: Business process outsourcing for enterprise functions including finance, HR, supply chain, sourcing, and industry-specific services.

products.name: Song
products.description: Customer experience services spanning design, digital products, marketing, sales, commerce, and AI-powered customer service.

products.name: Industry X
products.description: Digital and engineering services combining manufacturing expertise with AI, digital twins, robotics, and capital project transformation.

partnerships.description: Accenture is the number-one partner for all top 10 ecosystem partners, among the worlds largest technology companies by revenue.
